title: Monologue
description: Whenever you play a card this turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
smart_description:
Whenever you play a card this turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
Currently granting [blue]0[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
notes: Stack type is conditional: displays as Counter when Strength has been applied (StrengthApplied > 0), otherwise None. The power grants 1 Strength per card played this turn and removes itself at turn end, also removing all granted Strength.
